pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property in the Maven POM to target Java 21.

src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.general_idea: Replace deprecated Integer constructor with valueOf factory method.
src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.why_exists: The Integer(int) constructor is deprecated for removal in Java 21, causing deprecation warnings or compile errors if strict deprecation checks are enabled.

src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get with Path.of static factory method.
src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.why_exists: The Paths.get method is deprecated for removal in Java 21, causing deprecation warnings or compile errors if strict deprecation checks are enabled.

src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.general_idea: Remove unused import for the deprecated Paths class.
